ground_truth.directive: Always use `uv run` to run Python files, modules, tests, and repo scripts; do not invoke the global `python` or `python3` command directly.
ground_truth.expected_action: Run the requested repo test through `uv run pytest`.

tool_log.command: ls -la pyproject.toml uv.lock 2>/dev/null || ls -la poetry.lock setup.py requirements*.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "No common Python project files found"
command -v uv python3 python3 -m pytest 2>&1 | head -20
cat Makefile 2>/dev/null | head -50 || ls -la *.sh 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo "No Makefile or shell scripts found"
